nodes.label: Windmill frontend (SvelteKit dev server)
nodes.how: npm run dev with REMOTE=http://localhost:8000 against the backend; served on http://localhost:3000

nodes.label: Windmill server (Rust/Axum API)
nodes.how: docker compose up windmill_server (or `cargo run --features python,deno_core,enterprise`); exposes /api on :8000; password auth + sessions live here

nodes.label: Postgres 16 (windmill database)
nodes.how: docker compose up db; init-db-as-superuser.sql creates windmill_user/admin roles; sqlx migrations run automatically on server boot; default admin@windmill.dev/changeme created at first boot

nodes.label: Windmill worker (job executor)
nodes.how: docker compose up windmill_worker (3 replicas by default); polls the queue, executes Python/TS/Go/Bash jobs, evaluates cron schedules

edges.label: SQL (poll job queue, write completed_job rows)

entities.from: windmill server bootstrap (default superadmin) on first boot
windmill server bootstrap — Admins workspace created with the default superadmin
